zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry John Collett於1520年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Collett35歲，母親Lady Alice Curwen36歲。他於1540年與Joan Hanks在英國格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Collett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the personal name Col(l), a pet form of Nicholas . There was also a feminine form, Collette, which may also have given rise to a surname. The name could also mean ‘Coll the younger’.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Henry John Collett was born in 1520, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Collett, was 35 and his mother, Lady Alice Curwen, was 36. He married Joan Hanks in 1540, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1592, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry John Collett(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Collett(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Curwen(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 Joan Hanks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry John Collett родился в 1520 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Collett было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Curwen, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hanks в 1540 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1592 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
